season: Any open season on any open bear unit during the 2026 season. See 2026 Black Bear Guidebook for season dates take methods.
Visit wildlife.utah.gov/bearharvest for units & closures. You are required to complete the annual bear orientation course & carry proof while hunting bear. Visit wildlife.utah.gov/bear for details.
